name: saloon
hints: The old saloon. There's a mirror and a large bell.
GET BELL - the bell is useful elsewhere. LOOK MIRR to examine the mirror.
The mirror may reveal a hidden room behind it. MOVE MIRR or LOOK behind it.
MOVE MIRR reveals a hidden office (room 12) with the Go Board treasure. GET BELL for the hotel. S=town (2).
notes: Saloon with mirror (hides office room 12) and bell (needed in hotel). S=town (2).
